requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (NS / IEC 60335-2-24, ASN)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（NS / IEC 60335-2-24，ASN）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（NS / IEC 60335-2-24，ASN）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances imported into Senegal must demonstrate electrical safety in line with the applicable IEC standard, IEC 60335-2-24 （Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, read with the general standard IEC 60335-1. The Association Senegalaise de Normalisation （ASN） develops and adopts Senegalese standards （NS）, predominantly by adopting IEC/ISO international standards as national standards, so the technical safety baseline for refrigerators is effectively the IEC 60335 series. Conformity is normally evidenced through a recognised test report （e.g. an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1） presented within the import conformity-assessment process （PEC/VoC, see frigsn-market-access-001）. Senegal's nominal grid is 230 V, 50 Hz; appliances must be rated and tested for this supply. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength of the enclosure, earthing continuity, and appliance markings.
summary.zh: 进口至塞内加尔的家用制冷器具须按适用的IEC标准证明电气安全，即IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），并与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用。塞内加尔标准化协会（ASN）制定并采纳塞内加尔国家标准（NS），主要将IEC/ISO国际标准采纳为国家标准，因此电冰箱的技术安全基准实际上即为IEC 60335系列。合格性通常通过被认可的检测报告（如依据IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB体系报告）在进口合格评定流程（PEC/VoC，见frigsn-market-access-001）中提交证明。塞内加尔标称电网为230 V、50 Hz；器具须按此供电额定并测试。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、外壳机械强度、接地连续性及器具标识。
summary.zht: 進口至塞內加爾的家用製冷器具須按適用的IEC標準證明電氣安全，即IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），並與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用。塞內加爾標準化協會（ASN）制定並採納塞內加爾國家標準（NS），主要將IEC/ISO國際標準採納為國家標準，因此電冰箱的技術安全基準實際上即為IEC 60335系列。合格性通常通過被認可的檢測報告（如依據IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB體系報告）在進口合格評定流程（PEC/VoC，見frigsn-market-access-001）中提交證明。塞內加爾標稱電網為230 V、50 Hz；器具須按此供電額定並測試。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、外殼機械強度、接地連續性及器具標識。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted as NS by ASN)
IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — Part 1: General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
ASN (Association Senegalaise de Normalisation) — national standards body developing/adopting NS standards (predominantly IEC/ISO adoptions)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 （Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers）, technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with GB 4706.1 （general requirements）. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory （GB） and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification （CCC） regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated body before sale in China. Because both GB 4706.13 and the Senegalese NS baseline trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the underlying technical content is closely aligned, but a Chinese CCC certificate itself is a domestic mark and is not, on its own, accepted as the conformity evidence for the Senegal import process.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中国国家偏差，并与GB 4706.1（通用要求）结合使用。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度执行；产品须经CNCA指定机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于GB 4706.13与塞内加尔NS基准均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底层技术内容高度一致，但中国CCC证书本身为国内标志，单凭其本身不被接受为塞内加尔进口流程的合格证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010但包含中國國家偏差，並與GB 4706.1（通用要求）結合使用。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度執行；產品須經CNCA指定機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於GB 4706.13與塞內加爾NS基準均源自IEC 60335-2-24，底層技術內容高度一致，但中國CCC證書本身為國內標誌，單憑其本身不被接受為塞內加爾進口流程的合格證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both regimes trace to IEC 60335-2-24, the safety technical gap is smaller than for jurisdictions with bespoke standards — but the conformity-evidence gap remains: (1) the Chinese CCC certificate is a domestic mark and is not, by itself, the document the Senegal import process relies on; conformity is normally shown via a recognised test report （e.g. an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24 / IEC 60335-1） assessed in the PEC/VoC programme. A CB report based on the same IEC standard greatly eases re-use because it captures national-deviation handling and ILAC/IECEE recognition. (2) Supply rating — Senegal's 230 V / 50 Hz nominal supply differs from China's 220 V / 380 V nominal; the 50 Hz frequency matches China, but voltage rating, plug/socket type, and instructions must suit the Senegalese market. (3) French-language documentation — safety instructions and markings must be available in French （see frigsn-market-access-002）. Manufacturers should confirm with a recognised conformity-assessment body whether existing CB/CCC test data fully covers IEC 60335-2-24 as applied in the Senegal process.
gap.zh: 由于两套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，安全技术差距小于采用自有标准的法域——但合格证据差距依然存在：（1）中国CCC证书为国内标志，单凭其本身并非塞内加尔进口流程所依据的文件；合格性通常通过在PEC/VoC项目中评估的被认可检测报告（如依据IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB体系报告）证明。基于相同IEC标准的CB报告因涵盖国家偏差处理及ILAC/IECEE互认而大大便于复用。（2）供电额定——塞内加尔230 V/50 Hz标称供电不同于中国220 V/380 V标称；50 Hz频率与中国一致，但电压额定、插头/插座类型及说明书须适配塞内加尔市场。（3）法语文件——安全说明书与标识须提供法语版本（见frigsn-market-access-002）。制造商应与被认可的合格评定机构确认现有CB/CCC检测数据是否完全涵盖塞内加尔流程中所适用的IEC 60335-2-24。
gap.zht: 由於兩套制度均源自IEC 60335-2-24，安全技術差距小於採用自有標準的法域——但合格證據差距依然存在：（1）中國CCC證書為國內標誌，單憑其本身並非塞內加爾進口流程所依據的文件；合格性通常通過在PEC/VoC項目中評估的被認可檢測報告（如依據IEC 60335-2-24/IEC 60335-1出具的IECEE CB體系報告）證明。基於相同IEC標準的CB報告因涵蓋國家偏差處理及ILAC/IECEE互認而大大便於複用。（2）供電額定——塞內加爾230 V/50 Hz標稱供電不同於中國220 V/380 V標稱；50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但電壓額定、插頭/插座類型及說明書須適配塞內加爾市場。（3）法語文件——安全說明書與標識須提供法語版本（見frigsn-market-access-002）。製造商應與被認可的合格評定機構確認現有CB/CCC檢測數據是否完全涵蓋塞內加爾流程中所適用的IEC 60335-2-24。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — electrical safety conformity to NS/IEC 60335-2-24 must be demonstrated within the import conformity process (PEC/VoC) before customs clearance; ASN adopts IEC standards as NS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety for refrigerators entering Senegal is benchmarked to NS/IEC 60335-2-24 (with IEC 60335-1), as ASN adopts IEC standards as NS. Chinese CCC to GB 4706.13 is a domestic mark and is not, by itself, the conformity evidence used in the Senegal import process; a recognised test report (ideally an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24) presented within the PEC/VoC programme is the practical route. Verify supply rating (230 V/50 Hz), plug type, and French-language instructions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入塞内加尔的电冰箱电气安全以NS/IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）为基准，因ASN将IEC标准采纳为NS。中国依据GB 4706.13的CCC为国内标志，单凭其本身并非塞内加尔进口流程所用的合格证据；在PEC/VoC项目中提交被认可的检测报告（最好为依据IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系报告）是切实可行的路径。须核实供电额定（230 V/50 Hz）、插头类型及法语说明书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入塞內加爾的電冰箱電氣安全以NS/IEC 60335-2-24（配合IEC 60335-1）為基準，因ASN將IEC標準採納為NS。中國依據GB 4706.13的CCC為國內標誌，單憑其本身並非塞內加爾進口流程所用的合格證據；在PEC/VoC項目中提交被認可的檢測報告（最好為依據IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系報告）是切實可行的路徑。須核實供電額定（230 V/50 Hz）、插頭類型及法語說明書。
